title: Long Tan
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:MCRV_Long_Tan_TIE95.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] ''Long Tan'' under attack from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]].]]
The '''''Long Tan''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] operated by the [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] forces.

During the [[Sepan campaign]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|Escort Carrier]] ''[[Tropsobor]]'' delivered a consignment of [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]'s flagship, the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory-I'' class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']], near [[Gerbaud 2]] the ''Long Tan'' was part of a joint Dimok/[[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] assault force that attempted to disrupt the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] transfer.

[[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele's]] heroic performance saved the TIE Avengers, and also enabled [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] from the ''Protector'' to destroy the ''Long Tan''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
